headline: 1 Unstoppable Medical Juggernaut to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 50 Years
summary: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) is positioned for multi-decade compounding because it sits at the center of an aging-world healthcare megatrend with a razor-and-blade business model that compounds quietly whether the broader market is euphoric or fearful. The case for permanence rests on three pillars, and none of them depend on a single quarter, a single product ... 1 Unstoppable Medical Juggernaut to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 50 Years

headline: This Undervalued Medical-Devices Stock Is Poised for a Rebound
summary: Medtronic  is deeply undervalued and a good bet for your portfolio.  At the time, an uncertain growth outlook kept us from recommending the stock.  Four months later, it’s time to retire the narrative of Medtronic as a perpetual laggard.
